sentences.target: C'est mon premier jour au travail.

translations.fr: C'est mon premier jour au travail.
translations.en: It’s my first day at work.
translations.es: Es mi primer día en el trabajo.
translations.it: È il mio primo giorno di lavoro.
translations.ru: Это мой первый день на работе.
translations.pt: É meu primeiro dia no trabalho.
translations.vi: Hôm nay là ngày đầu tiên đi làm của tôi.
translations.ar: إنه أول يوم لي في العمل.
translations.uk: Це мій перший день на роботі.
translations.hi: आज मेरी नौकरी का पहला दिन है.
translations.pl: To mój pierwszy dzień w pracy.
translations.el: Είναι η πρώτη μου μέρα στη δουλειά.
translations.nb: Det er min første dag på jobb.
translations.id: Ini hari pertama saya di kantor.
translations.sv: Det är min första dag på jobbet.
translations.ro: Este prima mea zi la serviciu.
translations.cs: Je to můj první den v práci.
translations.da: Det er min første dag på arbejde.

tokens.explanation: Cliticized demonstrative pronoun (ce) elided before a vowel; functions as dummy/subject pronoun in the copular clause.
3rd person singular present of être used as a copula linking the subject to the predicate nominal.
1st person singular possessive determiner; agrees with a masculine singular noun.
Ordinal adjective, masculine singular; preposes and modifies the noun 'jour'.
Common noun, masculine singular; head of the predicate nominal.
Contraction of the preposition à and the definite article le; introduces the prepositional complement.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition (au).

sentences.target: Tu es mon premier client aujourd'hui.

translations.fr: Tu es mon premier client aujourd'hui.
translations.de: Du bist heute mein erster Kunde.
translations.it: Sei il mio primo cliente oggi.
translations.zh-Hans: 你是我今天的第一位顾客。
translations.yue: 你係我今日嘅第一位客人。
translations.pt: Você é meu primeiro cliente hoje.
translations.vi: Hôm nay bạn là khách hàng đầu tiên của tôi.
translations.nl: Jij bent mijn eerste klant vandaag.
translations.hu: Ma te vagy az első vendégem.
translations.hi: आज आप मेरे पहले ग्राहक हैं.
translations.el: Είσαι ο πρώτος μου πελάτης σήμερα.
translations.nb: Du er min første kunde i dag.
translations.id: Kamu adalah pelanggan pertama saya hari ini.
translations.sv: Du är min första kund idag.
translations.da: Du er min første kunde i dag.
translations.ja: 今日はあなたが最初のお客様です。

tokens.explanation: 2nd person singular personal pronoun; subject of the clause (informal).
2nd person singular present of être functioning as a copula.
1st person singular possessive determiner; agrees with masculine singular 'client'.
Ordinal adjective, masculine singular; modifies 'client'.
Common noun, masculine singular; predicate nominal after the copula.
Temporal adverb specifying the time of the state/event.

translations.en: The first bus is arriving now.
translations.es: El primer autobús está llegando ahora.
translations.de: Der erste Bus kommt jetzt an.
translations.it: Il primo autobus sta arrivando adesso.
translations.zh-Hans: 第一班公交车现在到了。
translations.pt: O primeiro ônibus está chegando agora.
translations.vi: Chiếc xe buýt đầu tiên đang đến bây giờ.
translations.nl: De eerste bus komt nu aan.
translations.hi: पहली बस अब आ रही है.
translations.ja: 最初のバスが今到着します。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, masculine singular; determiners the noun 'bus'.
Ordinal adjective, masculine singular; modifies 'bus'.
Common noun, masculine; head of the subject NP.
3rd person singular present indicative of a lexical verb; intransitive, denotes arrival.
Temporal adverb indicating the time of the event.

sentences.target: Nous regardons le premier épisode ce soir.
sentences.reading: /nu ʁəɡaʁdɔ̃ lə pʁəmje epizɔd sə swaʁ/

translations.fr: Nous regardons le premier épisode ce soir.
translations.ipa: /nu ʁəɡaʁdɔ̃ lə pʁəmje epizɔd sə swaʁ/
translations.en: We’re watching the first episode tonight.
translations.es: Esta noche vemos el primer episodio.
translations.de: Heute Abend schauen wir die erste Folge.
translations.ru: Мы сегодня вечером смотрим первый эпизод.
translations.pt: Hoje à noite vamos assistir ao primeiro episódio.
translations.vi: Tối nay chúng tôi xem tập đầu tiên.
translations.nl: Vanavond kijken we de eerste aflevering.
translations.uk: Сьогодні ввечері ми дивимося першу серію.
translations.hu: Ma este megnézzük az első részt.
translations.hi: आज रात हम पहला एपिसोड देखेंगे.
translations.nb: I kveld ser vi første episode.
translations.id: Malam ini kami menonton episode pertama.
translations.sv: Ikväll tittar vi på första avsnittet.
translations.ro: Diseară ne uităm la primul episod.
translations.cs: Dnes večer se díváme na první epizodu.
translations.da: I aften ser vi første afsnit.

tokens.explanation: 1st person plural personal pronoun; subject of the clause.
1st person plural present indicative of a transitive verb.
Definite article, masculine singular; introduces the direct object noun.
Ordinal adjective, masculine singular; modifies 'épisode'.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of 'regardons'.
Demonstrative determiner forming the temporal NP 'ce soir' used adverbially.
Common noun, masculine singular; head of the temporal NP functioning as an adverbial.

jp: C'est mon premier jour au travail.
Tu es mon premier client aujourd'hui.
Nous regardons le premier épisode ce soir.
fu: /nu ʁəɡaʁdɔ̃ lə pʁəmje epizɔd sə swaʁ/
fr: C'est mon premier jour au travail.
Tu es mon premier client aujourd'hui.
Nous regardons le premier épisode ce soir.
ipa: /nu ʁəɡaʁdɔ̃ lə pʁəmje epizɔd sə swaʁ/
en: It’s my first day at work.
The first bus is arriving now.
We’re watching the first episode tonight.
